narrative:
Precinct West Rutland (precinct in Meigs County) has 548 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.2 percentage points.
